meta.siteName: Master Premier Green Energy Co. Ltd
meta.description: Master Premier Green Energy Co. Ltd provides engineering and clean energy advisory services in South Sudan.
meta.homeTitle: Master Premier Green Energy Co. Ltd | Renewable Energy Solutions

nav.brand: Master Premier Green Energy Co. Ltd

contact.heading: Get in Touch with Our Solar Experts
contact.subheading: Ready to switch to solar? Contact us today for a free consultation.

chatbot.title: Xyberosec Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi 👋 I'm your assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot.fallback: I didn’t fully understand. Try one of these:

services.question: What are you looking for?
services.energyAuditReply: We provide technical studies, audits, and feasibility for renewable projects.
services.systemDesignReply: We can prepare system design and commercial proposals for your goals.
services.installationReply: Our team handles installation, commissioning, and after-service support.

courses.question: What kind of training do you need?
courses.beginnerReply: We can guide you to beginner clean-energy and technical training paths.
courses.teamReply: We also run capacity-building and customized team training modules.

pricing.question: Would you like a quick estimate or a custom quote?
pricing.quoteReply: Great. Share scope and location, and we’ll prepare a tailored quotation.
pricing.compareReply: Plans vary by system size, site conditions, and maintenance requirements.

contact.question: How would you like to connect with us?
contact.addressReply: Thongping, Florian Road, Block 3, Plot No. 258, Juba, South Sudan.

company.question: Want a quick overview of Master Premier Green Energy?
company.missionReply: We deliver reliable, modern renewable energy solutions for green economies and rural access.
company.whySolarReply: Solar helps reduce bills, improve energy security, and protect the environment.
company.qualityReply: We focus on stability, durability, reliability, and superior Tier-1 materials.

common.backMessage: Sure—going back to your previous step.
